violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine and around ice machine requires more frequent cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - Cabinets behind the serving line dirty with food debris.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Ceiling tile framing is in need of cleaning and resurfacing due to rust and flaking. Ceiling tiles need to be replaced due to flaking and peeling.
